import io
import string

fn to_upper_ascii(_ s: String) -> String
  let len = string.len(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b - 32)}"
    else
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  println(to_upper_ascii(line))
  Ok(())
end
